news.title: 美移民官枪杀本国公民视频曝光
news.title0: Footage shows US citizen shot dead by ICE agent in Texas traffic stop
news.content: 新公布的执法记录仪视频显示，一名美国公民去年在得州被移民官员致命枪击前的混乱时刻。
news.content0: Newly released body camera footage shows the chaotic moments leading up to the fatal shooting of a US citizen by an immigration officer in Texas last year, which only recently came to light.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 北爱尔兰水上乐园威胁排干湖水以阻止夜泳者
news.title0: Water park owner will drain lake unless trespassers stop swimming
news.content: 北爱尔兰一水上乐园所有者表示，除非夜间非法游泳者停止进入，否则将排干湖水以防止潜在溺水风险。
news.content0: The owner of a water park has said he will drain the lake to prevent someone from potentially drowning unless young trespassers stop swimming in it at night.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美司法部公布爱泼斯坦文件，含对特朗普未证实指控
news.title0: Withheld Epstein files with accusations against Trump released by justice department
news.content: 美国司法部公布了此前被扣留的爱泼斯坦案文件，其中包含一名女性对特朗普未经证实的性侵指控。
news.content0: FBI documents summarising interviews with a woman who made unsubstantiated claims of sexual assault against Donald Trump have been released as part of the US Department of Justice's (DOJ) trove of Epstein files.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 伊朗总统为何向邻国道歉？
news.content: 伊朗总统佩泽希基扬就近期对邻国的袭击表示道歉，分析称此举意在控制地区冲突升级。
news.content0: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian surprised many observers when he apologised to Iran's neighbours for recent strikes against them, during an address delivered on Saturday morning as part of the country's interim leadership.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 以色列特种部队突袭黎巴嫩村庄寻失踪者遗骸，数十人死亡
news.title0: Dozens killed as Israeli special forces raid Lebanese village in search of 40-year-old remains
news.content: 以色列特种部队在黎巴嫩东部村庄执行任务，寻找一名失踪40年的飞行员遗骸，导致至少41人死亡。
news.content0: Dozens more people have been killed in Lebanon in major Israeli air and ground operations, as the war with the Iran-backed group Hezbollah continues to escalate.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 乌克兰战场出现武装机器人
news.title0: Armed robots take to the battlefield in Ukraine war
news.content: 乌克兰军队大规模部署武装地面机器人，用于执行攻击、防御和后勤任务，以应对人员短缺。
news.content0: Since the start of Russia's full-scale invasion, the war in Ukraine has developed into a high-tech conflict.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 伊朗大使警告英国谨慎介入战争
news.title0: Iranian ambassador warns UK to be 'very careful' about further involvement in war
news.content: 伊朗驻英大使警告英国需“非常谨慎”地考虑进一步介入冲突，否则伊朗将保留自卫权。
news.content0: The Iranian ambassador in London has warned the UK to be "very careful" about becoming further involved in the war.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 特朗普要求伊朗“无条件投降”
news.title0: Trump demands 'unconditional surrender' from Iran as Putin speaks with Iran's president
news.content: 美国总统特朗普要求伊朗“无条件投降”，并称将在伊朗选出“可接受”的领导人后助其重建。
news.content0: US President Donald Trump has demanded Iran's "unconditional surrender" as the American and Israeli military continued to launch strikes.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美轰炸机降落英国基地准备打击伊朗
news.title0: US lands bomber at UK air base after warning of surge in strikes on Iran
news.content: 一架可携带24枚巡航导弹的美国轰炸机降落在英国空军基地，此前美方警告对伊朗的打击将“急剧增加”。
news.content0: A US bomber capable of carrying 24 cruise missiles has landed in the UK after Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer approved "defensive" US action against Iranian missile sites from UK bases.
news.author: BBC
